channel.title: Job-postings | DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: None at this time
item.description: We are not recruiting for any open positions at this time. Please don’t hesitate to contact Dr. Will Petry ( wpetry@ncsu.edu) if you are interested in pursuing a funding opportunity that would support your position, or have funding already in-hand. See the Join Us page for instructions about what to include in your email.
